interactions.clinical_effect: 增加维生素A过多症风险（肝毒性、高钙血症）
增加假性脑瘤（颅内压升高）风险

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加肝毒性风险
可能降低抗凝效果，需加强INR监测

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加肝毒性和高甘油三酯血症风险
可能降低避孕效果，不建议单独使用
interactions.mechanism: Mechanism unclear; not recommended as sole contraceptive

interactions.clinical_effect: 显著增强抗凝作用，增加出血风险
interactions.mechanism: Sulfamethoxazole inhibits warfarin metabolism; trimethoprim may reduce vitamin K production

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加骨髓抑制和肾毒性风险
interactions.mechanism: Sulfonamides displace methotrexate from protein binding and reduce renal clearance

interactions.clinical_effect: 增加高钾血症风险
interactions.mechanism: Trimethoprim reduces renal potassium excretion, additive with other potassium-increasing drugs

interactions.clinical_effect: 增强降糖作用，增加低血糖风险
interactions.mechanism: Sulfonamides may increase insulin release and displace sulfonylureas from protein binding

interactions.mechanism: Tetracyclines may inhibit prothrombin metabolism or reduce vitamin K production
